name: OpenClaw Quest
description: RPG-style observability dashboard for OpenClaw agents — cycle runner, feedback loop, tavern NPCs, and a World Map that fills in from your agent's task history.

port.description: TCP port the Quest backend listens on.

host.description: Bind host. Use 127.0.0.1 for loopback only or 0.0.0.0 to expose the dashboard on your LAN.

cycleEnabled.description: When true, the CYCLE button spawns the REFLECT → PLAN → EXECUTE → REPORT loop via `openclaw agent`.

cycleAgentId.description: OpenClaw agent id invoked for cycles and NPC chat.

autoStart.description: Auto-start the Fastify backend as a managed service when OpenClaw boots. Disable to run it manually with `bun src/main.ts`.

bunBin.description: Override the Bun binary path. Defaults to $BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun, then `bun` on $PATH.

port.label: Backend Port
port.help: TCP port the Quest Fastify backend listens on.

host.label: Bind Host
host.help: 127.0.0.1 for loopback only, 0.0.0.0 for LAN access.

cycleEnabled.label: Enable CYCLE Runner
cycleEnabled.help: Allow the CYCLE button to spawn the REFLECT → PLAN → EXECUTE → REPORT loop.

cycleAgentId.label: Cycle Agent ID
cycleAgentId.help: Which OpenClaw agent to invoke for cycles and NPC chat.

autoStart.label: Auto-start Backend
autoStart.help: Start the Fastify backend when OpenClaw boots. Disable to start it manually.

bunBin.label: Bun Binary
bunBin.help: Override the Bun binary path. Leave blank to auto-detect.
